summary: Phase 3 Deferred Slice 5 (fixed local hotkeys) is complete. Implements a deterministic shared hotkey catalog (HOTKEYS), an injected-adapter hotkey registration controller (createHotkeyController), comprehensive tests covering catalog shape/registration/duplicate avoidance/unregistering/adapter failure, and minimal Electron main-process integration using globalShortcut to trigger existing pet events (toggle-window, explode, next-character). All verification checks pass, 133/133 tests pass, typecheck and build succeed. No forbidden Phase 3 features (plugins, backend, notifications, file UI, user-editable hotkeys) were added.
evidence: npm run build: all three bundles (renderer/main/preload) build successfully
src/shared/hotkeys.ts exports HOTKEYS, createHotkeyController, HotkeyAdapter, HotkeyController, and RegisterAllResult
src/shared/hotkeys.test.ts has 5 tests covering catalog shape, registration and dispatch, duplicate avoidance, selective unregistering, and adapter failure isolation
src/main.ts wraps Electron globalShortcut with the injected adapter, dispatches toggle-window/explode/next-character, registers after app readiness, and unregisters before quit
loop/reports/phase-3-deferred5-acceptance.md documents implemented changes and honored constraints
No forbidden files (pluginActions.ts, backend.ts, notifications.ts) exist
manual_verification_required: Configured fixed hotkeys trigger existing pet actions
Hotkeys are registered only while the app is running and are unregistered on quit
No user-editable hotkey UI, plugin, backend, notification, upload, or cloud behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: Do not advance to another slice until the human manual gate is approved.
